name: Treasure Atlas
short_description: Adventurers, set out to explore the remnants of the Great Civilization, seeking to restore lost greatness and unravel the secrets of the past. The much-loved game genre is now in 3D and with a unique class division
detailed_description:
In Treasure Atlas, players move their characters around the map by interacting with various events located on the map. These events can include buffs, debuffs, monster encounters, and dungeons. In turn-based battles, players use their decks to defeat enemies and advance their exploration of the world.

Features

World generation: each playthrough takes place on a new map, providing unique challenges and opportunities to explore.

Deck building: as you progress through the game, assemble a unique deck, making each adventure unique.

Turn-based battles: Each turn requires strategic choices to defeat enemies and use your deck and resources effectively.

Story

In an ancient and mysterious world of many continents, a harmonious kingdom once thrived, ruled by wise mages and valiant warriors. However, an ancient curse has torn this world into separate regions plunged into chaos. Now adventurers explore the remnants of a great civilisation, seeking to restore the lost greatness and unravel the secrets of the past.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Japanese
